title: rubus × erythrandrus
intro: Rubus × erythrandrus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or loganberry, is a complex interspecific hybrid between the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). The medicinal properties of the Rubus × erythrandrus plant include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × erythrandrus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and provide relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers. Rubus × erythrandrus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, jams, and tinctures, which can be taken to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
